content.description: Investigate external IP activity against ADFS infrastructure. Uses the same session reconstruction as the Executive dashboard, enriched with True-Client-IP from EventCode 510 headers. Use wildcard (*) for all IPs/users or enter specific values to filter.
content.eai:data:
<dashboard version="2" theme="light">
    <label>ADFS: Source IP Trace vNext</label>
    <description>Investigate external IP activity against ADFS infrastructure. Uses the same session reconstruction as the Executive dashboard, enriched with True-Client-IP from EventCode 510 headers. Use wildcard (*) for all IPs/users or enter specific values to filter.</description>
    <definition><![CDATA[
{
	"title": "ADFS: Source IP Trace vNext",
	"description": "Investigate external IP activity against ADFS infrastructure. Uses the same session reconstruction as the Executive dashboard, enriched with True-Client-IP from EventCode 510 headers. Use wildcard (*) for all IPs/users or enter specific values to filter.",
	"inputs": {
		"input_global_trp": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "@d,now",
				"token": "global_time"
			},
			"title": "Global Time Range",
			"type": "input.timerange"
		},
		"input_ip_filter": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "*",
				"token": "ip_input"
			},
			"title": "IP Filter",
			"type": "input.text"
		},
		"input_user_filter": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "*",
				"token": "user_input"
			},
			"title": "User Filter",
			"type": "input.text"
		}
	},
	"defaults": {
		"dataSources": {
			"ds.search": {
				"options": {
					"queryParameters": {
						"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
						"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
					}
				}
			}
		}
	},
	"visualizations": {
		"viz_detail_table": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_detail_table"
			},
			"options": {
				"count": 50,
				"drilldown": "none",
				"headerVisibility": "fixed",
				"showRowNumbers": false
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Session Details",
			"type": "splunk.table"
		},
		"viz_failure_count": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_failure_count"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Token Failures",
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue"
		},
		"viz_outcome_dist": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_outcome_dist"
			},
			"options": {
				"labelDisplay": "valuesAndPercentage"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Outcome Distribution",
			"type": "splunk.pie"
		},
		"viz_protocol_dist": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_protocol_dist"
			},
			"options": {
				"labelDisplay": "valuesAndPercentage"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Protocol Distribution",
			"type": "splunk.pie"
		},
		"viz_session_count": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_session_count"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Total Sessions",
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue"
		},
		"viz_site_dist": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_site_dist"
			},
			"options": {
				"labelDisplay": "valuesAndPercentage"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Site Distribution",
			"type": "splunk.pie"
		},
		"viz_source_ip_dist": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_source_ip_dist"
			},
			"options": {
				"labelDisplay": "valuesAndPercentage"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Source IP Distribution",
			"type": "splunk.pie"
		},
		"viz_success_count": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_success_count"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Tokens Issued",
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue"
		},
		"viz_target_app": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_target_app"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Target Application",
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue"
		},
		"viz_target_app_dist": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_target_app_dist"
			},
			"options": {
				"labelDisplay": "valuesAndPercentage"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Target App Distribution",
			"type": "splunk.pie"
		},
		"viz_targeted_users": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_targeted_users"
			},
			"options": {
				"count": 50,
				"drilldown": "none",
				"showRowNumbers": false
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Targeted Usernames",
			"type": "splunk.table"
		},
		"viz_timeline": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_timeline"
			},
			"options": {
				"dataValuesDisplay": "off",
				"legendDisplay": "right",
				"legendMode": "standard",
				"lineWidth": 2,
				"nullValueDisplay": "gaps",
				"showSplitSeries": false,
				"xAxisTitleVisibility": "show",
				"yAxisAbbreviation": "auto",
				"yAxisScale": "linear",
				"yAxisTitleVisibility": "show"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Session Timeline",
			"type": "splunk.line"
		},
		"viz_top_source_ip": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_top_source_ip"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Top Source IP",
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue"
		},
		"viz_unique_users": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_unique_users"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Unique Usernames",
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue"
		},
		"viz_useragent": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_useragent"
			},
			"options": {
				"count": 20,
				"drilldown": "none",
				"showRowNumbers": false
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "User Agent Breakdown",
			"type": "splunk.table"
		}
	},
	"dataSources": {
		"ds_detail_table": {
			"name": "Session detail table",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203)) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex \"Client IP:\\s*(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"redirect_uri=(?<ru_raw>[^&]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<UserId>(?<xml_user>[^<]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<RelyingParty>(?<relying_party_raw>[^<]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<AuthProtocol>(?<auth_protocol>[^<]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<ProxyServer>(?<proxy_server>[^<]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<MfaPerformed>(?<mfa_flag_txt>true|false)</MfaPerformed>\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<MfaMethod>(?<mfa_method_tmp>[^<]+)</MfaMethod>\"\n| eval mfa_flag = if(mfa_flag_txt==\"true\",1,0)\n| eval mfa_method = if(EventCode==1200, mfa_method_tmp, null())\n| eval user_raw = coalesce(UserId, Target_User_Name, Caller_User_Name, Client_User_Name, xml_user)\n| eval user = replace(user_raw, \"^the organization-AD\\\\\\\\\", \"\")\n| stats min(_time) as start_time max(_time) as end_time values(EventCode) as stages count as event_count values(instance_id) as instance_ids values(client_ip) as client_ips values(relying_party_raw) as rps_raw values(auth_protocol) as protos values(redirect_uri) as redirect_uri values(redirect_host) as redirect_host values(host) as servers values(proxy_server) as proxy_servers values(user) as users max(mfa_flag) as mfa_flag values(mfa_method) as mfa_methods by activity_id\n| eval mfa = if(mfa_flag==1, \"MFA\", \"No MFA\")\n| eval mfa_method = mvindex(mfa_methods, 0)\n| eval rps_raw = mvdedup(rps_raw)\n| eval rp_clean = mvfilter(rps_raw!=\"WS-Trust endpoint (legacy clients)\" AND rps_raw!=\"https://host.example.gov/[redacted-path] eval relying_party = coalesce(mvindex(rp_clean, 0), mvindex(rps_raw, 0))\n| lookup ADFS_friendly_names url as relying_party output friendlyName as rp_friendly\n| eval relying_party = coalesce(rp_friendly, relying_party)\n| eval proto_raw = lower(mvindex(mvfilter(len(protos)>0),0))\n| eval protocol = case(match(proto_raw,\"oauth\"), \"OIDC\", match(proto_raw,\"saml\"), \"SAML\", match(proto_raw,\"wsfed\"), \"WS-Fed\", 1=1, \"Other\")\n| eval user = mvindex(users, 0)\n| where (\"$user_input$\"=\"*\" OR user=\"$user_input$\")\n| eval is_proxy = if(mvcount(mvfilter(proxy_servers!=\"N/A\"))>0,1,0)\n| eval cred_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1202\")>=0,1,0), cred_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1203\")>=0,1,0), token_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1200\")>=0,1,0), token_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1201\")>=0,1,0)\n| eval outcome = case(token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1, \"Success\", token_fail==1, \"Token Failure\", cred_fail==1, \"Credential Failure\", 1=1, \"Other\")\n| where outcome!=\"Other\"\n| eval application = relying_party\n| eval flow = case(is_proxy==1, \"WAP->ADFS\", 1=1, \"ADFS-only\")\n| eval client_ip = mvindex(client_ips, 0)\n| eval instance_id = mvindex(instance_ids, 0)\n| eval host_upper = upper(trim(mvindex(servers, 0)))\n| eval site = case(match(host_upper, \"^(A|P)-ESS-SEN-(ADF5|WAP5)\"), \"site-a\", match(host_upper, \"^S-ESS-SEN-(SSO1|SSO2|WAP1|WAP2)\"), \"site-b\", 1=1, \"UNKNOWN\")\n| join type=left instance_id [search index=windows_events EventCode=510 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) | rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | rex \"Client IP:\\s*(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\" | rex field=_raw \"True-Client-IP\\\":\\\"(?<source_ip>[^\\\"]+)\" | rex field=_raw \"User-Agent\\\":\\\"(?<user_agent>[^\\\"]+)\" | rex field=_raw \"wtrealm=(?<realm_raw>[A-Za-z0-9%.:/_-]+)\" | where isnotnull(source_ip) | dedup instance_id | eval realm_510 = urldecode(realm_raw) | lookup ADFS_friendly_names url as realm_510 output friendlyName as realm_friendly | eval realm_510 = coalesce(realm_friendly, realm_510) | fields instance_id source_ip user_agent realm_510]\n| where (\"$ip_input$\"=\"*\" OR source_ip=\"$ip_input$\" OR client_ip=\"$ip_input$\")\n| eval time = strftime(start_time, \"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S\")\n| eval external_ip = coalesce(source_ip, \"N/A\")\n| eval client_ip = coalesce(client_ip, \"N/A\")\n| eval application = case(isnotnull(application) AND application!=\"N/A\" AND NOT match(application, \"WS-Trust\"), application, isnotnull(realm_510), realm_510, 1=1, coalesce(application, \"Unknown\"))\n| rename time as Time, client_ip as \"Client IP\", external_ip as \"External IP\", user as User, application as Application, protocol as Protocol, site as Site, outcome as Outcome, activity_id as \"Activity ID\"\n| table Time \"Client IP\" \"External IP\" User Application Protocol Site Outcome \"Activity ID\"\n| sort - Time",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_failure_count": {
			"name": "Token failures",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203)) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex \"Client IP:\\s*(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<UserId>(?<xml_user>[^<]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<ProxyServer>(?<proxy_server>[^<]+)\"\n| eval user_raw = coalesce(UserId, Target_User_Name, Caller_User_Name, Client_User_Name, xml_user)\n| eval user = replace(user_raw, \"^the organization-AD\\\\\\\\\", \"\")\n| stats min(_time) as start_time values(EventCode) as stages values(instance_id) as instance_ids values(client_ip) as client_ips values(user) as users by activity_id\n| eval user = mvindex(users, 0)\n| where (\"$user_input$\"=\"*\" OR user=\"$user_input$\")\n| eval cred_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1202\")>=0,1,0), cred_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1203\")>=0,1,0), token_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1200\")>=0,1,0), token_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1201\")>=0,1,0)\n| eval outcome = case(token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1, \"Success\", token_fail==1, \"Token Failure\", cred_fail==1, \"Credential Failure\", 1=1, \"Other\")\n| where outcome!=\"Other\"\n| eval client_ip = mvindex(client_ips, 0), instance_id = mvindex(instance_ids, 0)\n| join type=left instance_id [search index=windows_events EventCode=510 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) | rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | rex \"Client IP:\\s*(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\" | rex field=_raw \"True-Client-IP\\\":\\\"(?<source_ip>[^\\\"]+)\" | where isnotnull(source_ip) | dedup instance_id | fields instance_id source_ip]\n| where (\"$ip_input$\"=\"*\" OR source_ip=\"$ip_input$\" OR client_ip=\"$ip_input$\")\n| stats count(eval(outcome=\"Token Failure\")) as \"Token Failures\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_success_count": {
			"name": "Tokens issued",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203)) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex \"Client IP:\\s*(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<UserId>(?<xml_user>[^<]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<ProxyServer>(?<proxy_server>[^<]+)\"\n| eval user_raw = coalesce(UserId, Target_User_Name, Caller_User_Name, Client_User_Name, xml_user)\n| eval user = replace(user_raw, \"^the organization-AD\\\\\\\\\", \"\")\n| stats min(_time) as start_time values(EventCode) as stages values(instance_id) as instance_ids values(client_ip) as client_ips values(user) as users by activity_id\n| eval user = mvindex(users, 0)\n| where (\"$user_input$\"=\"*\" OR user=\"$user_input$\")\n| eval cred_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1202\")>=0,1,0), cred_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1203\")>=0,1,0), token_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1200\")>=0,1,0), token_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1201\")>=0,1,0)\n| eval outcome = case(token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1, \"Success\", token_fail==1, \"Token Failure\", cred_fail==1, \"Credential Failure\", 1=1, \"Other\")\n| where outcome!=\"Other\"\n| eval client_ip = mvindex(client_ips, 0), instance_id = mvindex(instance_ids, 0)\n| join type=left instance_id [search index=windows_events EventCode=510 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) | rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | rex \"Client IP:\\s*(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\" | rex field=_raw \"True-Client-IP\\\":\\\"(?<source_ip>[^\\\"]+)\" | where isnotnull(source_ip) | dedup instance_id | fields instance_id source_ip]\n| where (\"$ip_input$\"=\"*\" OR source_ip=\"$ip_input$\" OR client_ip=\"$ip_input$\")\n| stats count(eval(outcome=\"Success\")) as \"Tokens Issued\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_session_count": {
			"name": "Total sessions",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203)) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex \"Client IP:\\s*(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<UserId>(?<xml_user>[^<]+)\"\n| eval user_raw = coalesce(UserId, Target_User_Name, Caller_User_Name, Client_User_Name, xml_user)\n| eval user = replace(user_raw, \"^the organization-AD\\\\\\\\\", \"\")\n| stats min(_time) as start_time values(EventCode) as stages values(instance_id) as instance_ids values(client_ip) as client_ips values(user) as users by activity_id\n| eval user = mvindex(users, 0)\n| where (\"$user_input$\"=\"*\" OR user=\"$user_input$\")\n| eval cred_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1202\")>=0,1,0), cred_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1203\")>=0,1,0), token_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1200\")>=0,1,0), token_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1201\")>=0,1,0)\n| eval outcome = case(token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1, \"Success\", token_fail==1, \"Token Failure\", cred_fail==1, \"Credential Failure\", 1=1, \"Other\")\n| where outcome!=\"Other\"\n| eval client_ip = mvindex(client_ips, 0), instance_id = mvindex(instance_ids, 0)\n| join type=left instance_id [search index=windows_events EventCode=510 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) | rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | rex \"Client IP:\\s*(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\" | rex field=_raw \"True-Client-IP\\\":\\\"(?<source_ip>[^\\\"]+)\" | where isnotnull(source_ip) | dedup instance_id | fields instance_id source_ip]\n| where (\"$ip_input$\"=\"*\" OR source_ip=\"$ip_input$\" OR client_ip=\"$ip_input$\")\n| stats count as \"Total Sessions\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_unique_users": {
			"name": "Unique usernames",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203)) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex \"Client IP:\\s*(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<UserId>(?<xml_user>[^<]+)\"\n| eval user_raw = coalesce(UserId, Target_User_Name, Caller_User_Name, Client_User_Name, xml_user)\n| eval user = replace(user_raw, \"^the organization-AD\\\\\\\\\", \"\")\n| stats min(_time) as start_time values(EventCode) as stages values(instance_id) as instance_ids values(client_ip) as client_ips values(user) as users by activity_id\n| eval user = mvindex(users, 0)\n| where (\"$user_input$\"=\"*\" OR user=\"$user_input$\")\n| eval cred_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1202\")>=0,1,0), cred_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1203\")>=0,1,0), token_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1200\")>=0,1,0), token_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1201\")>=0,1,0)\n| eval outcome = case(token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1, \"Success\", token_fail==1, \"Token Failure\", cred_fail==1, \"Credential Failure\", 1=1, \"Other\")\n| where outcome!=\"Other\"\n| eval client_ip = mvindex(client_ips, 0), instance_id = mvindex(instance_ids, 0)\n| join type=left instance_id [search index=windows_events EventCode=510 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) | rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | rex \"Client IP:\\s*(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\" | rex field=_raw \"True-Client-IP\\\":\\\"(?<source_ip>[^\\\"]+)\" | where isnotnull(source_ip) | dedup instance_id | fields instance_id source_ip]\n| where (\"$ip_input$\"=\"*\" OR source_ip=\"$ip_input$\" OR client_ip=\"$ip_input$\")\n| stats dc(user) as \"Unique Usernames\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_top_source_ip": {
			"name": "Top source IP",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203)) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex \"Client IP:\\s*(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<UserId>(?<xml_user>[^<]+)\"\n| eval user_raw = coalesce(UserId, Target_User_Name, Caller_User_Name, Client_User_Name, xml_user)\n| eval user = replace(user_raw, \"^the organization-AD\\\\\\\\\", \"\")\n| stats min(_time) as start_time values(EventCode) as stages values(instance_id) as instance_ids values(client_ip) as client_ips values(user) as users by activity_id\n| eval user = mvindex(users, 0)\n| where (\"$user_input$\"=\"*\" OR user=\"$user_input$\")\n| eval cred_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1202\")>=0,1,0), cred_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1203\")>=0,1,0), token_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1200\")>=0,1,0), token_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1201\")>=0,1,0)\n| eval outcome = case(token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1, \"Success\", token_fail==1, \"Token Failure\", cred_fail==1, \"Credential Failure\", 1=1, \"Other\")\n| where outcome!=\"Other\"\n| eval client_ip = mvindex(client_ips, 0), instance_id = mvindex(instance_ids, 0)\n| join type=left instance_id [search index=windows_events EventCode=510 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) | rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | rex \"Client IP:\\s*(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\" | rex field=_raw \"True-Client-IP\\\":\\\"(?<source_ip>[^\\\"]+)\" | where isnotnull(source_ip) | dedup instance_id | fields instance_id source_ip]\n| where (\"$ip_input$\"=\"*\" OR source_ip=\"$ip_input$\" OR client_ip=\"$ip_input$\")\n| eval ip = coalesce(source_ip, client_ip, \"Unknown\")\n| stats count by ip | sort - count | head 1\n| eval \"Top Source IP\" = ip . \" | \" . count | fields \"Top Source IP\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"

				"query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203)) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex \"Activity rex field=_raw \"<RelyingParty>(?<relying_party_raw>[^<]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<ProxyServer>(?<proxy_server>[^<]+)\"\n| eval user_raw = coalesce(UserId, Target_User_Name, Caller_User_Name, Client_User_Name, xml_user)\n| eval user = replace(user_raw, \"^the organization-AD\\\\\\\\\", \"\")\n| stats min(_time) as start_time values(EventCode) as stages values(instance_id) as instance_ids values(client_ip) as client_ips values(relying_party_raw) as rps_raw values(user) as users by activity_id\n| eval user = mvindex(users, 0)\n| where (\"$user_input$\"=\"*\" OR user=\"$user_input$\")\n| eval rps_raw = mvdedup(rps_raw)\n| eval rp_clean = mvfilter(rps_raw!=\"WS-Trust endpoint (legacy clients)\" AND rps_raw!=\"https://host.example.gov/[redacted-path] eval relying_party = coalesce(mvindex(rp_clean, 0), mvindex(rps_raw, 0))\n| lookup ADFS_friendly_names url as relying_party output friendlyName as rp_friendly\n| eval relying_party = coalesce(rp_friendly, relying_party)\n| eval cred_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1202\")>=0,1,0), cred_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1203\")>=0,1,0), token_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1200\")>=0,1,0), token_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1201\")>=0,1,0)\n| eval outcome = case(token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1, \"Success\", token_fail==1, \"Token Failure\", cred_fail==1, \"Credential Failure\", 1=1, \"Other\")\n| where EventCode=510 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) | rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | rex \"Client IP:\\s*(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\" | rex field=_raw \"True-Client-IP\\\":\\\"(?<source_ip>[^\\\"]+)\" | rex field=_raw \"wtrealm=(?<realm_raw>[A-Za-z0-9%.:/_-]+)\" | where isnotnull(source_ip) | dedup instance_id | eval realm_510 = urldecode(realm_raw) | lookup ADFS_friendly_names url as realm_510 output friendlyName as realm_friendly | eval realm_510 = coalesce(realm_friendly, realm_510) | fields instance_id source_ip \"WS-Trust\"), application, isnotnull(realm_510), realm_510, 1=1, coalesce(application, \"Unknown\"))\n| stats count by application | sort - count | head 1\n| eval \"Target App\" = application . \" | \" . count | fields \"Target App\"",

0)\n| where (\"$user_input$\"=\"*\" OR user=\"$user_input$\")\n| eval cred_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1202\")>=0,1,0), cred_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1203\")>=0,1,0), token_ok = 			"name": "Targeted usernames",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203)) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex \"Client IP:\\s*(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<UserId>(?<xml_user>[^<]+)\"\n| eval user_raw = coalesce(UserId, Target_User_Name, Caller_User_Name, Client_User_Name, xml_user)\n| eval user = replace(user_raw, \"^the organization-AD\\\\\\\\\", \"\")\n| stats min(_time) as start_time values(EventCode) as stages values(instance_id) as instance_ids values(client_ip) as client_ips values(user) as users by activity_id\n| eval user = mvindex(users, 0)\n| where (\"$user_input$\"=\"*\" OR user=\"$user_input$\")\n| eval cred_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1202\")>=0,1,0), cred_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1203\")>=0,1,0), token_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1200\")>=0,1,0), token_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1201\")>=0,1,0)\n| eval outcome = case(token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1, \"Success\", token_fail==1, \"Token Failure\", cred_fail==1, \"Credential Failure\", 1=1, \"Other\")\n| where outcome!=\"Other\"\n| eval client_ip = mvindex(client_ips, 0), instance_id = mvindex(instance_ids, 0)\n| join type=left instance_id [search index=windows_events EventCode=510 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) | rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | rex \"Client IP:\\s*(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\" | rex field=_raw \"True-Client-IP\\\":\\\"(?<source_ip>[^\\\"]+)\" | where isnotnull(source_ip) | dedup instance_id | fields instance_id source_ip]\n| where (\"$ip_input$\"=\"*\" OR source_ip=\"$ip_input$\" OR client_ip=\"$ip_input$\")\n| where isnotnull(user) AND user!=\"N/A\" AND user!=\"\"\n| stats count as Attempts by user | sort - Attempts\n| rename user as Username",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_useragent": {
			"name": "User agent breakdown",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203)) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex \"Client IP:\\s*(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<UserId>(?<xml_user>[^<]+)\"\n| eval user_raw = coalesce(UserId, Target_User_Name, Caller_User_Name, Client_User_Name, xml_user)\n| eval user = replace(user_raw, \"^the organization-AD\\\\\\\\\", \"\")\n| stats min(_time) as start_time values(EventCode) as stages values(instance_id) as instance_ids values(client_ip) as client_ips values(user) as users by activity_id\n| eval user = mvindex(users, 0)\n| where (\"$user_input$\"=\"*\" OR user=\"$user_input$\")\n| eval cred_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1202\")>=0,1,0), cred_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1203\")>=0,1,0), token_ok = if(mvfind(stages,\"1200\")>=0,1,0), token_fail = if(mvfind(stages,\"1201\")>=0,1,0)\n| eval outcome = case(token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1, \"Success\", token_fail==1, \"Token Failure\", cred_fail==1, \"Credential Failure\", 1=1, \"Other\")\n| where outcome!=\"Other\"\n| eval client_ip = mvindex(client_ips, 0), instance_id = mvindex(instance_ids, 0)\n| join type=left instance_id [search index=windows_events EventCode=510 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) | rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | rex \"Client IP:\\s*(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\" | rex field=_raw \"True-Client-IP\\\":\\\"(?<source_ip>[^\\\"]+)\" | rex field=_raw \"User-Agent\\\":\\\"(?<user_agent>[^\\\"]+)\" | where isnotnull(source_ip) | dedup instance_id | fields instance_id source_ip user_agent]\n| where (\"$ip_input$\"=\"*\" OR source_ip=\"$ip_input$\" OR client_ip=\"$ip_input$\")\n| where isnotnull(user_agent)\n| stats count as Sessions by user_agent | sort - Sessions\n| rename user_agent as \"User Agent\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		}
	},
